creator: southeasternguy@icloud.com
text:
converted the download of 2 stable version to a usb using rufus 3.2.1
in the ASUS Prime Deluxe 2 bios, I selected the usb to load. Bios immediatly notified me with a red box, not to load this OS. It said to open an alternative and not direct.
I could not load the os through my Bios.
My machine has 4 operating systems, all boot correctly. Wanted to experiment and add one more OS but could not.
I tried versions 13.1 and 13.0
